meta.title: Leaderboard | AI Game Connect
meta.description: Preview AI Game Connect rankings for Football, Padel, Chess, PlayStation, Board games, Dominoes, areas, and venues.

hero.title: Track your progress. Climb the leaderboard.
hero.body: Future leaderboards will help players follow activity, verified participation, fair play, and ranking movement across the games they love.

sections.title: Rankings across activities, areas, and venues.
sections.body: The preview covers the categories the platform is being designed to support.

items.title: Area rankings
items.body: Preview local leaderboards by city or area.

items.title: Venue rankings
items.body: Preview leaderboards connected to approved places.

sections.title: Preview only — live ranking profiles are coming soon.
sections.body: Sample rows show the planned structure without claiming live results.

sections.title: A fair ranking model will be published later.
sections.body: These are possible signals, not a final algorithm.

items.title: Participation
items.body: Showing up to approved activities can matter.

items.title: Results
items.body: Verified results may support ranking movement.

items.title: Tournament results
items.body: Approved competitions may carry special weight.

items.title: Verified attendance
items.body: Confirmed presence helps avoid fake matches.

items.title: Fair play
items.body: Healthy competition and rule respect should matter.

items.title: Consistency
items.body: Regular approved activity may be recognized.

sections.title: Static filters for the preview.
sections.body: These controls show the future interface direction and do not filter live data yet.

sections.title: Rankings need trust before they need speed.
sections.body: The system is being designed around verified play and approved places.

items.title: Verified activities
items.body: Activity should be connected to real play.

items.title: Approved venues
items.body: Ranked play belongs in approved places.

items.title: Confirmed results
items.body: Results should be confirmed before they matter.

items.title: No fake matches
items.body: The preview rejects ranking without real participation.

sections.title: Register now to be ready for ranking access.
sections.body: Player accounts, activity profiles, and live ranking movement are coming later.

sections.title: Leaderboard questions.
sections.body: The preview explains rankings without claiming a final live system.
